meta.title: SIYBT 2027 — Sarajevo International Youth Basketball Tournament
meta.description: 28–31 January 2027. Sarajevo becomes the epicenter of youth basketball. 70 teams, 8 categories, 16 countries, 6 venues.

hero.tagline: WHERE BALKAN BASKETBALL MEETS THE WORLD.
hero.subheadline: Where Balkan basketball meets the world. 70 teams. 8 categories. 16 countries. 4 days in Sarajevo.

about.title: Continental scale. Sarajevo precision.
about.p1: The Sarajevo International Youth Basketball Tournament gathers the strongest youth programs from the BiH diaspora, the region and wider Europe across four days of competition in six premium Sarajevo venues.
about.p2: Our mission is to build the meeting point where young athletes discover Sarajevo for the first time, and where Sarajevo welcomes the most talented youth basketball generation in the Balkans.
about.p3: The tournament is delivered by an organizing committee with decades of combined experience in sport, basketball operations and large-scale event production.

venues.title: Premium venues
venues.body: Six certified arenas across Sarajevo, anchored by Hotel Hills Arena.

stream.title: Live stream
stream.body: Every court streamed in HD. Family at home never misses a quarter.

tv.title: TV production
tv.body: Multi-camera production for finals, with broadcast-ready highlight reels.

hotel.title: Hotel package
hotel.body: Curated club housing with shuttles to every venue.

family.title: Family experience
family.body: Parent package with arena access, hotel rate and a city programme.

sponsors.title: First-tier partners
sponsors.body: BH Telecom and other category leaders stand behind SIYBT.

venuesSection.title: Sarajevo, court by court.
venuesSection.subtitle: From Ilidža to the city centre — every game inside a 20-minute radius.

globe.title: From Stockholm to Skopje.
globe.subtitle: Programs travel from across Europe to share four days of basketball in Sarajevo.

sponsorsSection.title: Partner with SIYBT.
sponsorsSection.pitch: Partner with the tournament. BH Telecom and other leading brands stand behind SIYBT.

ctaBlock.title: Seventy teams. Not one more.
ctaBlock.body: Capacity is fixed. Club registrations close 30 November 2026.

tournament.title: Tournament
tournament.lead: Four days of basketball, eight categories, six venues across Sarajevo.
tournament.categoriesLead: Boys and girls, U12 through U18 — eight parallel competitions across four days, with finals on Sunday.
tournament.formatBody: Group stage Thursday and Friday. Crossover knockout Saturday. Finals on Sunday with broadcast production. All games are 4 × 8 minutes for U12/U14 and 4 × 10 minutes for U16/U18.
tournament.rulesTitle: FIBA youth, with a tournament edge.
tournament.rulesBody: FIBA youth rules with modified game length per category. The full ruleset is distributed to clubs upon confirmation, including eligibility, refereeing standards, conduct and tie-break procedure.

faq.q1: How are eligibility and age verified?
faq.a1: Each athlete must hold a valid passport and a current club registration. Documents are checked at accreditation on the day before the first game.
faq.a2: Yes. Each club is responsible for travel and medical insurance for its delegation. SIYBT provides arena medical staff during games.
faq.q3: Can clubs bring more than one team per category?
faq.a3: Up to two teams per category, subject to capacity. Multiple-team requests are handled on a first-come basis after club registration closes.
faq.a4: Full refund up to 30 November 2026. After that date, fees are non-refundable but the slot can be transferred to another club from the waiting list.

tournament.ctaBody: Registration closes 30 November 2026 or once 70 teams are confirmed.

teams.title: Teams
teams.lead: Live count of confirmed clubs across categories and countries.
teams.empty: No teams match your filters yet.

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.lead: Filter by day, category and venue. Live games are highlighted.
schedule.tip: All times are local Sarajevo time.
schedule.empty: No matches scheduled for this slice.

venuesPage.title: Venues
venuesPage.lead: Six certified arenas across Sarajevo. Every game within a 20-minute radius.

family.title: Family package
family.lead: Built for parents. Hotel night, arena access and a city programme — all bundled.
family.includesBody: We worked with hotels, transport providers and arenas to deliver one bundle that removes the logistics from a family weekend in Sarajevo.
list: Hotel night with breakfast in a partner hotel
Daily shuttle to all six venues
Reserved family seating in the arenas

single.title: Solo parent
single.body: One parent, one bed, one breakfast. Built for the cleanest stay.

double.title: Two parents
double.body: Two parents sharing a room with twin or queen bed configuration.

ski.title: Jahorina day trip
ski.body: Saturday day trip to Jahorina or Bjelašnica with skiing or sledding included.

book.title: Reserve in one form.
book.body: Submit your dates and party size. The team replies with a confirmation and payment instructions within 48 hours.

sponsors.title: Sponsors
sponsors.lead: Partner tiers, brand benefits and a downloadable deck.

tierBodies.gold: Title status across all venues, full broadcast presence, named centre court at Hotel Hills Arena, brand integration in the opening and closing ceremonies, premium hospitality.
tierBodies.silver: On-court LED rotation, branded zones in two venues, broadcast inserts, hospitality for senior partners and on-site activation space.
tierBodies.bronze: Court-side signage in one venue, partner mention in broadcast graphics, partner badge across digital channels and event entry tickets.

sponsors.whyTitle: A tournament with a real audience.
sponsors.whyBody: Four days, six venues, eight categories. The tournament reaches families across Bosnia, the wider region and the diaspora — both in arenas and through the multi-court live stream.

reach.title: Reach
reach.body: 840 athletes, families and basketball professionals on site, plus an estimated 60.000 stream viewers.

broadcast.title: Broadcast
broadcast.body: TV-grade production for finals with regional broadcaster distribution.

trophy.title: Trophy moment
trophy.body: Title partners on every podium and every official photograph.

community.title: Community
community.body: A long-standing, year-round programme through partner schools and academies.

sponsors.ctaTitle: Take a slot before they're gone.

media.title: Media
media.lead: Photos, video and the live stream from all six courts.
media.soon: The live broadcast goes live on the first match day.

press.title: Everything you need for a story.
press.body: Logo pack, photography pack, fact sheet, organizing committee statement and brand guidelines.
